review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.

verification.concerns: All looks correct. The excluded albums are correctly the instrumental/orchestral scores from the movie, not the original audiobook. The included albums follow a consistent pattern of German "Das Original-Hörspiel zur TV-Serie" releases for the Miraculous cartoon. No overrides or splits were proposed by the first reviewer.
